top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Stocks drop as ‘inflationary fears swirling’; CBI slashes UK GDP
top_signals.summary: Good morning and welcome back to the City AM liveblog. Rachel Reeves is staring down another bruising growth downgrade this morning after the Confederation of British Industry (CBI) slashed the UK’s GDP forecast to 1.1 per cent for the year. The figure is a drop from 1.4 per cent last year and below the previous [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: GSK Agrees to Buy Nuvalent for $10.6 Billion
top_signals.summary: GSK agreed to buy Nuvalent in a deal valued at $10.6 billion, adding a biotech firm that’s developing treatments for lung cancer as the British pharmaceutical company seeks to rebuild its oncology franchise. Sam Fazeli of Bloomberg Intelligence has more. (Source: Bloomberg)
